heading: Facilitation
label: 5369 Facilitation
notes: References in TextSection 101(a) of the PROGRESS for Indian Tribes Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , which is set out as a note under .section 101(a) of Pub. L. 116–180section 5361 of this title

children.text: the inclusion of programs in funding agreements; and

children.label: A
children.text: an identification of the specific text in the regulation sought to be waived; and

children.heading: Determination by the secretary
children.label: 2 Determination by the secretary
children.text: Not later than 120 days after receipt by the Secretary and the designated officials under paragraph (4) of a request under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall approve or deny the requested waiver in writing to the Indian Tribe.

children.heading: Extensions
children.label: 3 Extensions
children.text: The deadline described in paragraph (2) may be extended for any length of time, as agreed upon by both the Indian Tribe and the Secretary.

children.heading: Designated officials
children.label: 4 Designated officials
children.text: The Secretary shall designate one or more appropriate officials in the Department to receive a copy of the waiver request described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Grounds for denial
children.label: 5 Grounds for denial
children.text: The Secretary may deny a request under paragraph (1) upon a specific finding by the Secretary that the identified text in the regulation may not be waived because such a waiver is prohibited by Federal law.

children.heading: Failure to make determination
children.label: 6 Failure to make determination
children.text: If the Secretary fails to make a determination with respect to a waiver request within the period specified in paragraph (2) (including any extension agreed to under paragraph (3)), the Secretary shall be deemed to have agreed to the request, except that for a waiver request relating to programs eligible under section 5363(b)(2) or , the Secretary shall be deemed to have denied the request.section 5363(c) of this title

children.heading: Finality
children.label: 7 Finality
children.text: A decision of the Secretary under this section shall be final for the Department.
